case_title: MAC-GO, INC. DBA FILTERS "R" US VS PULIO ALFONSO DBA INSTA-LUBE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $350.00 FILED BY MAC-GO, INC. DBA FILTERS "R" US AS TO DEFENDANT PULIO ALFONSO DBA INSTA-LUBE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAC-GO, INC. DBA FILTERS "R" US RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PULIO ALFONSO DBA INSTA-LUBE $350.00 PRINCIPAL, $19.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $369.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO ALFONSO PULIO (INSTA-LUBE) RETURNED SIGNED.
